title: Layer sequence with colour flop effect without containing interference pigments
abstract: The present invention relates to a system, which comprises: a) a lower layer containing white pigment, b) on the lower layer at least one first colour layer containing a dye and/or pigment being different from the white pigment contained in the lower layer and being no metallic pigment, c) on the at least one first colour layer a metallic layer containing at least one metallic pigment and/or a platelet-shaped effect pigment, and d) on the metallic layer at least one second colour layer containing a dye and/or pigment being different from the white pigment contained in the lower layer and being no metal effect pigment, wherein: i) the delta a/b is at least 15, wherein the delta a/b is determined according to the equation delta a/b=((a[15Â°]-a[110Â°]) 2 +(b[15Â°]- b[110Â°)] 2 ) 1/2 , wherein a[15Â°] is the a-value measured at an observation value of 15Â°, a[110Â°] is the a-value measured at an observation value of 110Â°, b[15Â°] is the b-value measured at an observation value of 15Â° and b[110Â°] is the b-value measured at an observation value of 110Â°, wherein the measurement is performed by irradiating in a dark environment a standardized light type onto the system at an angle of incident of 45Â° with respect to the horizontal direction, wherein the angle of reflection of 135Â° with respect to the horizontal direction is defined as an observation angle of 0Â°, and/or ii) the delta L is at least 10, wherein the delta L is determined according to the equation delta L= | L[15Â°]-L[110Â°] |, wherein L[15Â°] is the L-value measured at an observation value of 15Â° and L[110Â°] is the L-measurement is performed by irradiating in a dark environment a standardized light type onto the system at an angle of incident of 45Â° with respect to the horizontal direction, wherein the angle of reflection of 135Â° with respect to the horizontal direction is defined as an observation angle of 0Â°, and wherein the system does not contain any interference pigment.
claims:
Claims Hubergroup Italia Claims 1. A system comprising: a) a lower layer (16) containing white pigment (24), b) on the lower layer (16) at least one first colour layer (18) containing a dye (26) and/or pigment being different from the white pigment (24) contained in the lower layer (16) and being no metallic pigment, c) on the at least one first colour layer (18) a metallic layer (20) containing at least one metallic pigment (28) and/or a platelet-shaped effect pigment, and d) on the metallic layer (20) at least one second colour layer (22) containing a dye (30) and/or pigment being different from the white pigment (24) contained in the lower layer (16) and being no metal effect pigment, wherein: i) the delta a/b is at least 15, wherein the delta a/b is determined according to the equation delta a/b=((a[15Â°]-a[11Q 0 ]) 2 +{b[15Â°]- b[110Â°]) 2 ) 1/2 , wherein a[15Â°] is the a-value measured at an observation value of 15Â°, a[110Â°] is the a-value measured at an observation value of 110Â°, b(15Â°] is the b-value measured at an observation value of 15Â° and b[110Â°] is the b-value measured at an observation value of 110Â°, wherein the measurement is performed by irradiating in a dark environment a standardized light type onto the system at an angle of incident of 45Â° with respect to the horizontal direction, wherein the angle of reflection of 135Â° with respect to the horizontal direction is defined as an observation angle of 0Â°, 

 and/or ii) the delta L is at least 10, wherein the delta L is determined according to the equation delta L= | L[15Â°]~L|110Â°] | , wherein L[15Â°] is the L- value measured at an observation value of 15Â° and L(110Â°] is the L- vaiue measured at an observation value of 110Â°, wherein the measurement is performed by irradiating in a dark environment a standardized light type onto the system at an angle of incident of 45Â° with respect to the horizontal direction, wherein the angle of reflection of 135Â° with respect to the horizontal direction is defined as an observation angle of 0Â°, and wherein the system does not contain any interference pigment. 2. The system in accordance with claim 1 , wherein the delta a/b is at least 30 and more preferably at least 38. 3. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the white pigment (24) included in the lower layer (16) is selected from the group consisting of titanium dioxide, barium sulfate, zinc oxide, zinc sulfide, lead carbonate, calcium carbonate, aluminium oxide, aluminium silicate and arbitrary combinations of two or more of the aforementioned substances. 4. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the lower layer (16): i) is a foil/film and contains 0.1 to 10% by weight, preferably 0.25 to 4% by weight and more preferably 0.75 to 1.5% by weight of white pigment (24) based on the total weight of the lower layer (16), wherein the foil/film has preferably a thickness of 1 to 100 pm, more preferably of 2 to 50 pm and most preferably of 10 to 30 pm, or is a plastic board or 

 ii) is a paper or cardboard and contains 0.1 to 50% by weight, preferably 1 to 10% by weight and more preferably 3 to 7% by weight of white pigment (24) based on the total weight of the lower layer (16) or in) is an ink or lacquer and contains 10 to 90% by weight and preferably 30 to 90% by weight of white pigment (24) based on the total weight of the lower layer (16), wherein the ink has preferably a thickness of 1 to 10,000 pm. 5. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the white pigment (24) included in the lower layer (16) is titanium oxide and preferably rutile. 6. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the metallic layer (20) contains a metallic pigment (28) and/or a platelet-shaped effect pigment being composed of particles (46) having an average length (48) of 2 to 500 pm, an average width (50) of 2 to 500 pm and an average thickness of 0.01 to at most 1 pm. 7. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the metallic layer (20) contains a metallic pigment (28) and/or a platelet-shaped effect pigment being composed of particles (46) having a first aspect ratio of the average particle length divided by the average particle width of maximum 1 to 20, and, a second aspect ratio of the average particle length divided by the average particle thickness of maximum 1 to 75,000. 8. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the average particle area ratio of the metallic layer (20) is 5 to 75%. 9. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the weight ratio of pigment to binder in the metallic layer (20) is 0.3:1 to 2:1 , more preferably 0.7:1 to 2:1 and most preferably 0.7:1 to 1.8:1. 10. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the metallic layer (20) has a thickness of 0.1 to 50 pm, more preferably of 0.5 to 20 pm and most preferably of 1 to 10 pm. 11. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the layers a) to d) are ink layers and the ink coverage of the metallic layer (20) on the at least one first colour layer (18) is 40 to 100%, more preferably 70 to 100%, even more preferably 80 to 100% and most preferably 90 to 100%, wherein the ink coverage is the percentage of the area of the uppermost of the first colour layer(s) (18), which is covered by the metallic layer (20). 12. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the grammage of the dry metallic layer (20) is 0.2 to 2 gsm, more preferably 0.3 to 1.5 gsm and most preferably 0,4 to 1.2 gsm. 13. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein any of the first colour layer (18) and of the at least one second colour layer (22) contains 0.001 to 5% by weight of at least one dye (26, 30) and/or 0.1 to 50% by weight of at least one pigment being no white pigment and no metallic pigment, based on the total dry weight of the first colour layer (18) and/or second colour layer (22). 14. The system in accordance with any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one dye (26) and/or at least one pigment included in the first colour 

 layer {18} is different from the at least one dye (30) and/or at least one pigment included in the at least one second colour layer (22). 15. A system comprising: a) a lower layer (16) containing white pigment (24), b) on the lower layer (16) at least one first colour layer (18) containing a dye (24) and/or pigment being different from the white pigment (24) contained in the lower layer (16) and being no metallic pigment, c) on the at least one first colour layer (18) a metallic layer (20) containing at least one metallic pigment (28) and/or a platelet-shaped effect pigment, and d) on the metallic layer (20) at least one second colour layer (22) containing a dye (30) and/or pigment being different from the white pigment (24) contained in the lower layer (16) and being no metal effect pigment, wherein the system does not contain any interference pigment.
